title: Change Impact Assessment
tagline: Assess the impact of a new time-tracking system on 3 departments.
scenario: A company is replacing manual timesheets with a digital time-tracking system. It affects Sales (field-based, often offline), Operations (shift workers, shared devices), and Finance (payroll processing). Each department will experience different impacts.
brief: Conduct a change impact assessment. For each department, identify what changes, who is affected, and the level of impact.
deliverables: A change impact matrix: Department × What Changes × Who Is Affected × Impact Level (High/Med/Low) × Readiness
The top 3 risks across all departments with mitigation strategies
One "quick win" per department that would build early adoption
submissionGuidance: Impact is not just about the technology. A field salesperson who now has to track time on their phone while driving has a different impact than an office worker with a desktop.

rubric.label: Impact Matrix
rubric.description: Is the matrix comprehensive with department-specific impacts?

rubric.label: Risk Identification
rubric.description: Are the risks specific to each department context?

rubric.label: Quick Wins
rubric.description: Are the quick wins practical and likely to build momentum?
